emails.subject: Re: ENE positions
emails.body: Re: ENE positions sorry i did not get a chance to revert back to you earlier. was out in new york. ok i will work on getting resources to help. however, could you confirm with everyone that you have NO OTHER deals other than what jill has listed? preferably before our meeting this afternoon? many thanks. From: Sara Shackleton@ECT on 07/21/2000 01:56 PM

emails.subject: Re: ENE positions
emails.body: Julia: don't do anything yet as I am putting together the package for this afternoon. Sara Julia H Chin@ENRON 07/25/2000 08:59 AM

emails.subject: Re: ENE positions
emails.body: good!! i won't do anything. but please confirm that your package will show all other deals not oringally listed in jill's. thanks. From: Sara Shackleton@ECT on 07/25/2000 09:19 AM
